name: vandeley
description: Art Vandeley's imported skills — importer/exporter of well-architected agents and skills.

plugins.name: art-vandeley
plugins.description: Art Vandeley — importer/exporter of well-architected skills. One install: the agent, /hello-art, and his full skill crate (architect, judge, export, verify, commit). Reads your environment, imports the skills that fit, and answers in Mermaid + Markdown.
